allow: PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -Method HEAD -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Not ready yet: $_" })

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/session/properties" -UseBasicParsing; $data = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $locales = $data.'supported-locales'; $siteLocale = $data.'site-locale'; Write-Output "Locales: $\($locales -join ','\)"; Write-Output "Site locale: $siteLocale"; Write-Output "Version: $\($data.version.tag\)")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\Schem\\Desktop\\TreeNB\\noco-app" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Length; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Users\\Schem\\Desktop\\TreeNB\\noco-app\\node_modules"\) { \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\Schem\\Desktop\\TreeNB\\noco-app\\node_modules" -Directory\).Count.ToString\(\) + " packages installed so far" })
Bash(sqlite3 prisma/saltlake.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total FROM LabData;")

Bash(sed -i 's/\\.btn{transition:all 0\\.2s cubic-bezier\(0\\.16,1,0\\.3,1\)}/.btn{transition:background 0.2s var\(--ease-spring\),color 0.2s var\(--ease-spring\),transform 0.2s var\(--ease-spring\),box-shadow 0.2s var\(--ease-spring\),border-color 0.2s var\(--ease-spring\),filter 0.2s var\(--ease-spring\)}/' src/app/globals.css)

Bash(sed -i 's/transition:all var\(--dur-fast\) var\(--ease-spring\);position:relative/transition:background var\(--dur-fast\) var\(--ease-spring\),color var\(--dur-fast\) var\(--ease-spring\),box-shadow var\(--dur-fast\) var\(--ease-spring\);position:relative/' src/app/globals.css)

Bash(sed -i 's/transition:all var\(--dur-fast\) ease;color:var\(--t2\);background:transparent/transition:background var\(--dur-fast\) ease,color var\(--dur-fast\) ease;color:var\(--t2\);background:transparent/' src/app/globals.css)

Bash(sed -i 's/transition:all var\(--dur-fast\) ease;border:1px solid var\(--glass-border\);background:var\(--surface-1\);cursor:pointer;text-align:left/transition:background var\(--dur-fast\) ease,border-color var\(--dur-fast\) ease,box-shadow var\(--dur-fast\) ease;border:1px solid var\(--glass-border\);background:var\(--surface-1\);cursor:pointer;text-align:left/' src/app/globals.css)

Bash(sed -i 's/transition:all var\(--dur-fast\) ease;color:var\(--t2\);background:transparent;cursor:pointer/transition:background var\(--dur-fast\) ease,color var\(--dur-fast\) ease,border-color var\(--dur-fast\) ease;color:var\(--t2\);background:transparent;cursor:pointer/' src/app/globals.css)

Bash(sed -i 's/transition:all var\(--dur-fast\) var\(--ease-spring\);border:1px solid var\(--glass-border\);color:var\(--t2\);background:var\(--surface-1\)/transition:background var\(--dur-fast\) var\(--ease-spring\),color var\(--dur-fast\) var\(--ease-spring\),border-color var\(--dur-fast\) var\(--ease-spring\);border:1px solid var\(--glass-border\);color:var\(--t2\);background:var\(--surface-1\)/' src/app/globals.css)

Bash(sed -i 's/transition:all var\(--dur-fast\) var\(--ease-spring\);border:none;background:transparent/transition:background var\(--dur-fast\) var\(--ease-spring\),color var\(--dur-fast\) var\(--ease-spring\);border:none;background:transparent/' src/app/globals.css)

Bash(sed -i 's/transition:all var\(--dur-fast\) var\(--ease-spring\);white-space/transition:background var\(--dur-fast\) var\(--ease-spring\),color var\(--dur-fast\) var\(--ease-spring\),transform var\(--dur-fast\) var\(--ease-spring\),box-shadow var\(--dur-fast\) var\(--ease-spring\),border-color var\(--dur-fast\) var\(--ease-spring\);white-space/' src/app/globals.css)
Bash(sed -i 's/transition:all var\(--dur-fast\) ease;padding:0!important/transition:background var\(--dur-fast\) ease,border-color var\(--dur-fast\) ease;padding:0!important/' src/app/globals.css)

Bash(sed -i 's/transition:all var\(--dur-fast\) ease;color-scheme/transition:background var\(--dur-fast\) ease,border-color var\(--dur-fast\) ease,box-shadow var\(--dur-fast\) ease;color-scheme/' src/app/globals.css)

Bash(sed -i 's/outline:none;transition:all var\(--dur-fast\) ease/outline:none;transition:background var\(--dur-fast\) ease,border-color var\(--dur-fast\) ease,box-shadow var\(--dur-fast\) ease/' src/app/globals.css)

Bash(sed -i 's/addToast\("导入" + result\\.count + "条", "success"\)/addToast\("导入" + result.count + "条" + \(result.skipped ? "，跳过" + result.skipped + "条\(井号不存在\)" : ""\), "success"\)/g' src/app/lab/page.tsx)

Bash(sed -i 's/addToast\("导入" + result\\.count + "条", "success"\)/addToast\("导入" + result.count + "条" + \(result.skipped ? "，跳过" + result.skipped + "条\(井号不存在\)" : ""\), "success"\)/g' src/app/monitoring/page.tsx)

Bash(sed -i 's/addToast\("导入" + result\\.count + "—", "success"\)/addToast\("导入" + result.count + "条" + \(result.skipped ? "，跳过" + result.skipped + "条\(无效采线\)" : ""\), "success"\)/g' src/app/wells/page.tsx)

Bash(awk 'NR==61{print} NR==61{print "  const doExpCSV = async \(\) => { try { const all = await getWells\({ region: region || undefined, lineId: line ? WELL_LINES.find\(l => l.shortName === line\)?.id : undefined, search: search || undefined, pageSize: 99999 }\); const rows = \(all as any\).data || []; if \(!rows.length\) { addToast\(\\"无数据可导出\\", \\"warning\\"\); return } exportCSV\(\\"基础信息\\", [\\"井号\\", \\"井采线\\", \\"片区\\", \\"成井时间\\", \\"工艺\\", \\"备注\\", \\"尺寸\\", \\"初始水位\\", \\"井深\\", \\"坐标X\\", \\"坐标Y\\"], rows.map\(\(r: any\) => [r.wellId, r.lineName || \\"--\\", RNAMES[r.region] || \\"--\\", fmtDate\(r.completionDate\), r.technology || \\"--\\", r.techNote || \\"--\\", r.wellSize || \\"--\\", fmt\(r.initialWaterLevel, P.WATER\), fmt\(r.designDepth, P.WELL_DEPTH\), fmt\(r.coordX, P.COORD\), fmt\(r.coordY, P.COORD\)]\)\); addToast\(\\"CSV 已导出\\", \\"success\\"\) } catch \(e: any\) { addToast\(\\"导出失败: \\" + e.message, \\"error\\"\) } }"; next}1' src/app/wells/page.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/setData\(r.data\); setTotal\(r.total\) }\)/setData\(r.data\); setTotal\(r.total\); setStats\(r.stats || null\) }\)/' src/app/wells/page.tsx)

Bash(sed -i 's/const \\[data, setData\\] = useState<any\\[\\]>\(\\[\\]\); const \\[total, setTotal\\] = useState\(0\); const \\[loading, setLoading\\] = useState\(false\)/const [data, setData] = useState<any[]>\([]\); const [total, setTotal] = useState\(0\); const [stats, setStats] = useState<any>\(null\); const [loading, setLoading] = useState\(false\)/' src/app/wells/page.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/<DataStats data={data} cols=/<DataStats data={data} total={total} stats={stats} cols=/' src/app/wells/page.tsx)

Bash(sed -i '/^@keyframes shimmer{0%{background-position:-200% 0}100%{background-position:200% 0}}$/c\\/* GPU shimmer -- uses pseudo-element + transform for 60fps */\\n@keyframes shimmerGPU{0%{transform:translate3d\(-100%,0,0\)}100%{transform:translate3d\(100%,0,0\)}}' src/app/globals.css)
Bash(sed -i 's/const r = useRef<HTMLDivElement>\(null\)/const r = useRef<HTMLDivElement>\(null\); const [obsRef, inView] = useInView\(\)/' src/components/dashboard/TrendChart.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/if \(!r.current || data.length === 0\) return/if \(!r.current || data.length === 0 || !inView\) return/' src/components/dashboard/TrendChart.tsx)

Bash(sed -i 's/return <div ref={r}/const setRefs = \(el: HTMLDivElement | null\) => { \(r as any\).current = el; \(obsRef as any\).current = el }\\n  return <div ref={setRefs}/' src/components/dashboard/TrendChart.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/const r = useRef<HTMLDivElement>\(null\)/const r = useRef<HTMLDivElement>\(null\); const [obsRef, inView] = useInView\(\)/' src/components/dashboard/WaterTrendChart.tsx)

Bash(sed -i 's/return <div ref={r}/const setRefs = \(el: HTMLDivElement | null\) => { \(r as any\).current = el; \(obsRef as any\).current = el }\\n  return <div ref={setRefs}/' src/components/dashboard/WaterTrendChart.tsx)

Bash(node -e "const yaml = require\('js-yaml'\); const fs = require\('fs'\); try { yaml.load\(fs.readFileSync\('electron-builder.yml','utf8'\)\); console.log\('OK'\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\(e.message\) }")
